final:
// // This register loads data on negative clock edges and resets to 11111111
module parallel_load_register
(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] q
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 8'b00000000; // Clear register to 00000000
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= data_in; // Load new data
        end
    end

endmodule
